name: dt-style-guide
description: Dynatrace corporate style guide checker and writing-aid plugin. Enforces terminology, trademarks, voice/tone, grammar, formatting, and inclusive-language rules from styleguide.dynatrace.com. Includes /dt-review-pr (review PR doc changes), /dt-review-docs (review files/directories with optional --fix), /dt-style-refresh (update vendored rules), a dt-style-checker agent, a dt-doc-fixer agent, a dt-style-rules skill, and vendored reference docs. Acts as a fallback for dev-workflows when no repo-configured prose linter is available.
